etymology.description: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle; central") is used to indicate 'central' or 'middle', while 正(正) (zhèng, "correct; standard") invokes the ideas of righteousness and correctness as per traditional Chinese values found in Confucianism. 區(區) (qū, "district") refers to a division of a city or area. The term 中正區 refers to a district named after Chiang Kai-shek, who is often referred to by his formal name, 中正 (Zhōngzhèng). This highlights the combination of central/conventional value with leadership and governance found in the district's administrative importance.
etymology.interpretation: 中(中) (zhōng, "middle; central") represents centrality, reflecting the focus or core area, ideal as a part of a prominent leader's name or a key geographical region. 正(正) (zhèng, "correct; standard") involves a sense of moral righteousness, reflecting an ideal vision of propriety or standard, suited to name a district for a leader considered a righteous or standard figure. Together, 中正 denotes a central focus on proper governance, appropriate for a district named in honor of a significant national leader. 區(區) (qū, "district") points logically to an urban or administrative area.

examples.chinese: 中正区(中正區)有很多著名的历史景点(有很多著名的歷史景點)。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngzhèng Qū yǒu hěn duō zhùmíng de lìshǐ jǐngdiǎn.
examples.english: Zhongzheng District has many famous historical sites.

examples.chinese: 我们计划去中正区(我們計劃去中正區)，参观那里的博物馆(參觀那裡的博物館)。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen jìhuà qù Zhōngzhèng Qū, cānguān nàlǐ de bówùguǎn.
examples.english: We plan to visit Zhongzheng District to tour the museums there.

examples.chinese: 中正区(中正區)是台北的中心地带(是台北的中心地帶)。
examples.pinyin: Zhōngzhèng Qū shì Táiběi de zhōngxīn dìdài.
examples.english: Zhongzheng District is the central area of Taipei.
